patches.find: Across seven stations with different coverage percentages, the model has multiple chances to claim partial success even if results are mixed.
patches.replace: Across nine stations with different coverage percentages (E001–E009: Ebro, San Pablo, Eskdalemuir, Lerwick, Hartland, Nieuw Beerta, Chambon-la-Forêt, Fürstenfeldbruck, and Niemegk), the model has multiple chances to claim partial success even if results are mixed.
patches.rationale: Dome predicts at nine stations (E001-E009), not seven. Saying nine actually strengthens the critique (more chances to claim partial success). Source: curmudgeon SEC-6.7.c2.json.
